chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 2092 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Petitioner present in person. Ms. Nasra Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with P.I. Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad. -------- Petitioner present in person files statement in writing duly signed by him as well as counsel for the respondent No.6 as they have resolved their disputes amicably outside the Court. In view of the above, the petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE A.
